message.content:
An **Aquagold facial** is available in the Houston area at several med spas and dermatology/plastic surgery practices, including Alford Facial Plastic Surgery, ZO Skin Centre Houston, Dr. Sharon Aesthetics, BCRN Aesthetics, Nia Aesthetics, Belage Cosmetic Surgery Center, Houston Dermatology and Plastic Surgery, and Queen Aesthetics.[1][2][3][4][5][6][7][8]

A few practical details from the listed providers:
- **Treatment time** is usually about **20 to 60 minutes**.[1][2][3]
- It is generally described as a **microinfusion / microneedling-style** procedure that can deliver custom blends such as **Botox/neuromodulators, hyaluronic acid, peptides, vitamins, PRP, or fillers**.[1][3][4][5][6][7][8]
- Expected benefits commonly include **glow, smoother texture, smaller-looking pores, and fewer fine lines**.[1][3][4][7][8]
- **Downtime is minimal**; temporary **redness** is common and usually fades within hours.[1][3][4][6][8]
- Some providers estimate pricing around **$500 to $1,000**, and one lists **starting at $750**.[5][8]

If you want, I can narrow this down to the **best options by neighborhood, price, or dermatologist/plastic-surgeon vs med spa**.
